title: 'Bare Metals' for Create Enchantment Industry
description: 'Bare Bones'-style resources for the Create Enchantment Industry addon. Requires the Bare Metals resource pack.
body:
**For other Create addons, view this collection** [](https://modrinth.com/collection/GEcFHDu3) **Retextures the [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) mod to fit in with the 'Bare Bones' resource pack together with [Bare Metals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals)** ![Showcase of Bare Metals for Create Slice & Dice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q60lidbr/images/bb6e40c0cebb8914cc3c99660f604455e440e988.jpeg)
Terms of Use: You are allowed to alter this resource pack as long as it is not commercially distributed or reuploaded without the permission of the author and follows the terms of use for Bare Bones addons stated by the rightsholder of that producement: "If you want to create addons for Bare Bones, make sure that no unnecessary textures exist in the addon texture pack, only then are you allowed to upload it." A copy of those terms can be found at https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones Do not reupload any instance of this resource pack unless stated. This includes but is not limited to the following cases; redistribution in other resource packs, reupload to alternative hosting sites (curseforge, planetminecraft, etc.). Reuploads to web archives are permissible, given the user credits the author and does not pass the resource pack as their own. This resource pack may be used in Modrinth modpacks as of the hosting site's creator policy.
